metadata.description: Opinionated developer-workflow plugins for Claude Code and Antigravity, generated from a single source of truth.

plugins.description: Standalone adversarial code review of any diff or PR — the adversarial-reviewer (+ cross-model Gemini) agents, the evidence-tracker hook, a /code-review command, a /simplify command, and security-review + testing-strategy skills. Enhances developer-workflows' review capability when both are installed.

enhances.effect: /review dispatches the adversarial reviewers (failing test / DEFECT: file:line / NO ISSUES FOUND)

plugins.name: code-review

plugins.description: Day-to-day testing + release discipline in one plugin — tests-are-sacred, verification-first, the 3-layer pyramid, the pre-release checklist, changelog-shape, and paired-release coordination for cross-repo releases.
plugins.name: conventions

plugins.description: Design-doc and ADR authoring — the /design command (author → translate → sequence) and the ADR skill for capturing architectural decisions with re-audit triggers.
plugins.name: design

plugins.description: Universal control + safety layer — kill-switch, steer, commit-on-stop hooks plus commit-no-coauthor / worktrees-operator-initiated conventions. Usable in any session; enhances developer-workflows (its hooks engage across the phase loop) when both are installed.
plugins.name: developer-safety

plugins.description: The phase-gated developer loop — /setup /plan /work /review /release /bugfix — extracted from agentm as a standalone native plugin. The base other dev plugins enhance.

enhances.effect: /work's task close-out (step 10) posts a per-commit progress comment + a task-close comment (SHA-keyed dedupe, list-and-match — never --search) alongside the existing board-item body-fold, when github-projects is installed and gh is authenticated

plugins.name: development-lifecycle

plugins.description: Deterministic-first failure diagnosis. /diagnose classifies a failure, recalls it via a fingerprint-first exact-match ladder (semantic fallback only on a miss), ranks hypotheses, and writes one scrubbed kind:failure-incident memory entry.
plugins.name: diagnostics

plugins.description: One-way, deterministic board-sync — synthesizes a vault project's roadmap/plan/progress state onto a GitHub Project board via six locked per-type templates, a single idempotent project_sync.py write path, and a vault==board drift gate. The vault stays the agent's source of truth; the board is the generated human source.
plugins.name: github-projects

plugins.description: CI workflows + dependency-update tooling — the dependabot-fixer skill that repairs breakage on Dependabot PRs.
plugins.name: maintenance

plugins.description: The Obsidian/Google-Drive vault storage backend for the agentm memory engine — re-homed out of the kernel behind the V5-1 storage seam. Ships the `vault` named backend (and, across V5-2, the vault-specific machinery) as an agentm-discovered scripts/ payload.
plugins.name: obsidian-vault

plugins.description: Scan diffs and the working tree for personal information (emails, personal paths, API keys, phone numbers) before commit or push.
plugins.name: privacy

plugins.description: Discovery-to-watchlist research primitives. idea-search is a read-only scan over the agentm recall engine surfacing existing vault/codebase entries relevant to a question. learn-forward and codebase-improvement (scheduled mining/detection onto the idea incubator, riding agentm's forward-experience runner) land in later tasks of this same plan.
plugins.name: research

plugins.description: Deterministic transcript-JSONL cost analyzer — per-message cost curve, 5h rolling window, floor breakdown, and cache-read vs cache-write vs fresh-input split. Prerequisite for Part C (status-line meter) and Part G (heat-based floor).
plugins.name: tokens

plugins.description: Opinionated, template-driven wiki maintenance — the wiki-author authoring/learning skill, the documenter agent, the diataxis-evaluator, recent-wiki-changes, and the check-wiki.py linter. Maintains a wiki in the operator's voice; enhances developer-workflows' phase-boundary documentation when both are installed.

enhances.effect: phase commands dispatch the documenter to author/repair wiki pages at phase boundaries

plugins.name: wiki
